---
title: "Ria Tang"
image: "files/photo.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yit029@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yihui-tang-5036843ab/
---

Welcome to my website!
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
